[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: The image shows a smartphone screen displaying what appears to be a music or app interface with a title bar and a chat-like or list entry at the bottom.

Main Subject:  
A dark-themed mobile application screen with the text “ALLSTARS KACIW” prominently centered near the top-left area, and smaller text “5 online” beneath it.

Setting:  
The scene is indoors by context of being a smartphone screen, with no external environment visible; the interface uses dark gray/black backgrounds.

Visual Details:  
At the top left, there is a circular icon containing a star-like logo and small text inside the circle. Near the top center-left, large white text reads “ALLSTARS KACIW,” and below it, smaller white text reads “5 online.” On the top right, there are small white icons including a pause or microphone-like symbol, and a vertical three-dot menu icon. Along the bottom portion, there is a darker bar with a green vertical indicator line on the left side. In the bottom bar, white text reads “LIST BABU ALLSTARS KACIW...” preceded by a small icon resembling a letter or symbol at the far left. The overall layout is horizontal and clean, with a dark theme and white typography.

Visible Text:  
ALLSTARS KACIW  
5 online  
LIST BABU ALLSTARS KACIW...

Practical Summary:  
This image shows a dark-themed smartphone interface displaying the title “ALLSTARS KACIW” with “5 online” underneath. A lower bar shows the text “LIST BABU ALLSTARS KACIW...” as part of a list or menu item.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
